scope.notes: 6 experiments (E1-E6), general 'small brain circuits' framing, control-estimation tradeoff thesis, CPG detection as novel contribution.

literature.notes: 19 references. Gemini 2.5 Pro v2 lit review. Cites Pillow GLM, transfer entropy, Price/Stein, Marder CPGs, Ahrens zebrafish, Quadrato organoids.

theory.notes: GPT-5.4 verified. Sign error in Eq 6 fixed. Price theorem (Eq 7) correct. E1=W(D'-I) simplification. Identifiability K>=log(N²/δ)/p².

experiment.notes: All 6 experiments at consistent N=12 baseline (66% meas, stim=1.0, 17-30 reps, 50 instances). Measurement noise parameter added to core.py. E6 oracle crossover confirms approx always wins.

analyze.notes: 9 figures in paper (F1-F8 + ablation in F4H). 4 architecture diagrams. All regenerated with N=12 data. Tol palette, CI shading, composite panels.

write.notes: 13 pages (10 main + 3 appendix). All numbers match data. 19 citations = 19 bib entries. Noise robustness paragraph. CPG detection paragraph. 5-point limitations. r=0.90 in conclusion.

review.notes: Line-by-line PDF review completed. Sign error caught and fixed by GPT-5.4. Bad citations removed. Diagonal-zero fix applied. Paper formatted for arXiv preprint.
